beatFlagged.headline: Iran postpones Khamenei funeral as US-Israeli bombardment continues
beatFlagged.description: An official says more preparations are needed for the three-day ceremony in Tehran, where the supreme leader will lie in state.

beatFlagged.headline: Israel tells people in large parts of southern Lebanon to leave ahead of attacks
beatFlagged.description: Civilians are being displaced, taking shelter in tents, parks and cars, as Israel retaliates to Hezbollah rocket attack.

beatFlagged.headline: 'All red lines have been crossed': Gulf states weigh response to Iranian strikes
beatFlagged.description: Retaliatory Iranian strikes on Gulf states have tarnished their image as safe and prosperous, writes the BBC's Barbara Plett-Usher.

beatFlagged.headline: Funerals held for students and staff after strike on Iran school
beatFlagged.description: Iranian authorities say they were killed in a US-Israeli strike in the city of Minab on Saturday.

beatFlagged.headline: Fears over food shortages in Tehran as residents worry about length of war
beatFlagged.description: Locals tell BBC Persian they are worried about the availability of groceries and price increases as strikes continue to hit the capital.

beatFlagged.headline: Battered and isolated, Hezbollah drags Lebanon into another war
beatFlagged.description: Its attack on Israel in support of Iran has led to fresh mass displacements and Israeli bombing, to the fury of many Lebanese.

beatFlagged.headline: Pentagon identifies six US soldiers killed in Iran conflict
beatFlagged.description: The US soldiers were killed after a drone evaded air defences to hit a command centre in Port Shuaiba, Kuwait, on Sunday.

beatFlagged.headline: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
beatFlagged.description: Lebanese officials say 52 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.

beatFlagged.headline: Strait of Hormuz: What happens if Iran shuts global oil corridor?
beatFlagged.description: Iran says it will "set fire" to ships trying to sail through the world's most vital oil transit point.

beatFlagged.headline: Trump's Iran endgame unclear after mixed messaging on war aims
beatFlagged.description: The US president laid out some of his objectives on Monday, but made no mention of what Iran's future might look like after the war.

beatFlagged.headline: What is behind the strategy to take out Iran's leadership?
beatFlagged.description: Security analyst Gordon Corera looks at what is likely to happen after much of Iran's most senior leadership is killed.

beatFlagged.headline: Iran's regime is still intact - the coming days will show if it can hold out
beatFlagged.description: Iran's surviving leaders are in crisis mode, battling to project security as US and Israel strikes continue.

beatFlagged.headline: Months of planning behind US-Israeli mission to target Iran's supreme leader
beatFlagged.description: A piece of crucial intelligence arrived just hours before the attack on a compound in central Tehran.

beatFlagged.headline: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
beatFlagged.description: Iran continues retaliatory strikes against Israel and across the Gulf, as US and Israeli attacks on Iran enter a fifth day.
